mapper.sql: id, name, address, thumbnail_url, business_hours, region_code, rating_avg, rating_count
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, address, lat, lng, description, phone, website, thumbnail_url, business_hours, region_code, rating_avg, rating_count, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM gyms WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'active' AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, name, address, lat, lng, description, phone, website, thumbnail_url, business_hours, region_code, rating_avg, rating_count, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM gyms WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, name, address, thumbnail_url, business_hours, region_code, rating_avg, rating_count, lat, lng, favorite FROM ( SELECT , lat, lng, CASE WHEN #{viewerId,jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM favorites f WHERE f.user_id = #{viewerId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND f.gym_id = gyms.id ) END AS favorite, 6371 * acos(GREATEST(-1.0, LEAST(1.0, cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(lat)) * cos(radians(lng) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(lat)) ))) AS distance_km FROM gyms WHERE lat IS NOT NULL AND lng IS NOT NULL AND status = 'active' AND deleted_at IS NULL ) t WHERE t.distance_km <= #{radiusKm} ORDER BY t.favorite DESC, t.distance_km, t.id LIMIT #{size}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gyms (name, address, lat, lng, description, phone, website, business_hours, region_code, status, created_by) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{description}, #{phone}, #{website}, #{businessHours}::jsonb, #{regionCode}, #{status}, #{createdBy})
